title: Suki's Starlight Adventure
synopsis: When little Suki loses her favorite stuffed bunny Luna at bedtime, she feels scared and sad. With help from her loving family, she goes on a brave adventure through the house to find Luna, discovering courage along the way and ending with a cozy, happy bedtime.

pages.text: Suki loved bedtime with her soft bunny Luna. But tonight, Luna was missing! Suki looked in her bed. No Luna. She felt scared and sad. "Where is Luna?" she whispered. Her big brown eyes filled with tears.

illustration.description: A young Japanese-American girl with shoulder-length black hair in pajamas decorated with tiny moons and stars, sitting on her bed looking worried. Her room has soft purple walls with glow-in-the-dark star stickers. The bed has rumpled yellow blankets and she's searching through them with a concerned expression. Warm lamplight creates a cozy but slightly anxious mood.
illustration.alt: Suki searching her bed for her missing bunny

pages.text: "I'll help you find Luna," said Mama gently. Papa smiled and said, "We'll search together." Suki felt a little brave now. Her family would help! They started their adventure in the living room, looking behind soft cushions and under the coffee table.

illustration.description: Suki holding hands with her parents - Mama with long black hair wearing a cozy sweater and Papa with kind eyes wearing glasses. They're in a warm living room with a tan sofa and colorful throw pillows. A Black family cat watches from a windowsill. The scene shows teamwork and love with soft evening lighting through the windows.
illustration.alt: Suki and her parents beginning their search in the living room

pages.text: They searched the kitchen where Luna sometimes watched Suki eat breakfast. They looked in the bathroom where Luna took bubble baths. Still no Luna! Suki felt worried again, but Papa squeezed her hand. "Don't give up," he said. "Let's try the playroom!"

illustration.description: A montage showing the family searching different rooms - peeking under a bright blue kitchen table with cereal bowls, looking behind a cheerful yellow bathroom curtain with rubber ducky. Suki appears determined but concerned while her diverse parents encourage her. The illustration uses warm, reassuring colors throughout each room scene.
illustration.alt: The family searching through different rooms of the house

pages.text: In the playroom, Suki looked inside her toy castle. There was Luna, sleeping peacefully next to her toy blocks! "Luna!" Suki cried happily. She felt so brave and proud. She hugged her bunny tight. "I found you!" Now she was ready for sweet dreams.

illustration.description: Suki joyfully holding her white stuffed bunny Luna in a bright playroom filled with colorful building blocks, a pink toy castle, and scattered crayons. Her face beams with happiness and relief. Her parents stand behind her, smiling proudly. The room has cheerful rainbow colors and soft evening light streaming through a window, creating a triumphant and cozy ending scene.
illustration.alt: Suki happily reunited with Luna in the playroom

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Suki feel when Luna was missing?
questions.explanation: Suki felt scared and sad when she couldn't find her favorite bunny Luna at bedtime.

questions.question: Who helped Suki look for Luna?
questions.explanation: Suki's Mama and Papa helped her search the house for Luna, making her feel brave.

questions.question: Where did they find Luna?
questions.explanation: They found Luna sleeping peacefully in the playroom next to Suki's toy blocks.

questions.question: How did Suki feel when she found Luna?
questions.explanation: Suki felt happy and brave when she found Luna, proud that she didn't give up searching.

pages.text: Suki loved bedtime with her soft bunny _____. But tonight, Luna was missing! Suki felt _____ and sad.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: In the playroom, Suki looked inside her toy _____. There was Luna! Suki felt so _____ and proud.
